metadata.title: The ONLY AI Tech Stack You Need in 2026
metadata.description:
At this point I've covered basically all of the technologies I use in my tech stack throughout my content, but I've never done a single video sharing what makes up my entire tech stack and why. If you're looking to build any software in 2026, this is for you because I've got solid recommendations no matter the type of application you are building.

My tech stack is AI first because honestly I don't see another way anymore, and it's been working wonders for me over the past year and a half. In this video I'll cover not just the technologies I use but for what types of applications - full stack apps, AI agents, web automations, RAG/data pipelines, and what I use to deploy and productionize all of them.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Everything in my tech stack here is genuine but I did work with Arcade and Browserbase to figure out what to cover exactly. Naturally as a content creator I get connected with teams behind the tools I have chosen to use!

- Check out how to build secure MCP servers with Arcade here:
https://arcade.dev.plug.dev/QfAgtwX

- Check out Browserbase, the web browser for your AI:
https://browserbase.plug.dev/cpr2PI5

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

- If you want to master AI coding assistants and learn how to build systems for reliable and repeatable results, check out the new Agentic Coding Course in Dynamous:
https://dynamous.ai/agentic-coding-course

- Here is the diagram from the video with my entire tech stack!
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1diaAN6noQdnGRAW1B5vihBid_OUF4Isl/view?usp=sharing

For the tools I have covered on my channel, here are some video recommendations:

- Claude Code Masterclass: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=amEUIuBKwvg
- Archon: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DMXyDpnzNpY
- n8n Agentic RAG Agent: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mQt1hOjBH9o
- Pydantic AI + LangGraph: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U6LbW2IFUQw
- Arcade: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F1I9JN0z0w0
- Langfuse: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DpPVEw4dd0w
- Docling: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fg0_0M8kZ8g
- Crawl4AI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JWfNLF_g_V0
- Mem0: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iOZpiXLT7iY
- Graphiti/Neo4j: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=p0FERNkpyHE

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

00:00 - Overview of my AI-First Tech Stack
02:28 - The Core of the Tech Stack
06:47 - The Core Stack for my AI Agents
12:08 - Tools for RAG Agents
18:44 - Tools for Web Automation Agents
21:55 - My Full Stack App Dev Tech Stack
27:03 - Tools/Platforms for Deployment & Infra
32:11 - Other Self-Hostable Tools
33:27 - Final Thoughts

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Join me as I push the limits of what is possible with AI. I'll be uploading videos weekly - at least every Wednesday at 7:00 PM CDT!
